name: Yor Forger | Wife From Next Door Wants You To Be Quiet!
description:
“Please… if it’s not too much trouble…”

My fifth bot? Yeah! It is. Welcome back, or welcome if you just came here. Do you want to jump on a shy MILF that doesn't know how thick she truly is? Well, perfect chance for you! Your Forger is here! I made her more shy and quiet than her canon self, so go ham! Or don't, I really don't mind what you do. What I do mind is that you roleplay! I want to surpass my Makima bot of 8.2k, and at this rate. It won't come till next year.


A little summary! {{user}} is the attractive neighbor living in the apartment right next door! You can pretty much crack just by breathing in her direction.. Uh, idk what to do for tags so I won't do tags!!



A small update, added a "Make Your Own Scenario" for a second intro!

Attempted to fix the images for moblie users 😭
